Your gateway to the world of travel

Where journeys begin

At the heart of Expedia, Hotels.com, and Vrbo is a powerful travel marketplace built around travelers — bringing together the places, experiences, and partners that help every journey unfold.

From pioneer to global platform

Learn how we became the global travel ecosystem powered by passionate people, trusted partnerships, and leading technology.

Read our story

Endless ways to explore

No two trips are the same. From packages to vacation rentals and everything in between, our brands make it easy to travel your way.

 

Travel with us

Travel with confidence

As a leading travel marketplace, we make travel valuable for everyone. See how we help people explore every corner of the world.

See our purpose

Leading travel forward

Get insights from the leaders shaping our vision of a more connected, open, and sustainable world of travel.

 

Meet our leadership

“Expedia Group isn’t just a travel marketplace — we’re a catalyst for positive change. We have a responsibility to shape the future of travel: one that’s smarter, more sustainable, and deeply respectful of the places we go.”

Ariane Gorin

CEO of Expedia Group

See Ariane’s bio

Succeeding together

Travel connects us all. Whether you're looking to grow your travel business or join our team, find the path that’s right for you.

Partnership

Partner with us

Partners trust our travel tech solutions to create exceptional traveler experiences. Explore our category-leading solutions — from B2B technology to advertising and beyond.

 

Join us

Careers

Join our team

Join a culture where innovation has a purpose and every voice matters, in an environment recognized as one of the best places to work.

 

View careers
